{{Quote|Not long ago, I was hired as an instructor at an Authority university on Kalla. It is a place for higher education, mostly for Authority scions, a school rooted in technical education, commerce, and administration, with minimal stress on the humanities.|Rekkon|<ref name="Han Solo at Stars' End">''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]''</ref>}}
'''Kalla VII''', also simply known as '''Kalla''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. It was the location of the [[University of Kalla]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base, and the headquarters of [[Unlimited Horizons Inc.]]

==History==
During [[Operation Skyhook]], while the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was looking for the location of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] discovered that Imperial ships were using the base for supplies and repairs on their way to the Death Star. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] proposed that if the base was destroyed, any passing ships heading for the Death Star would be stranded there, leaving them open to capture.

According to this, [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] led three [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] to destroy the base. The mission was successful as the Rebels destroyed all supply [[Class-A cargo container|containers]], the defensive [[Space mine/Legends|minefield]] and two [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] from ''[[Diputs group]]'', though [[Breth Gart]] was killed during a freak collision with the Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] [[Priam (starship)|''Priam'']] as it emerged from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The Rebels later returned to capture the now stranded ''Priam''.

Natives of Kalla included [[Evir Derricote]].<ref name="WG" />
